deduplication.title: Prevent Duplicate Peringatan
deduplication.subtitle: Avoid sending the same peringatan multiple times by grouping similar alerts together.
deduplication.fingerprintFieldsHint: Pilih fields that make alerts similar (e.g., hostname, service). Leave empty to auto-detect based on your query.
deduplication.fingerprintFieldsTooltip: Choose which fields should match for alerts to be considered duplicates. For example, selecting 'hostname' means alerts from the same host will be grouped together. Different peringatan types (e.g., High CPU vs High Memory) are never grouped, even if they come from the same host. Leave empty for automatic detection based on your kueri type.
deduplication.timeWindowHint: Time period to grup similar alerts. Leave empty to match your check interval.
deduplication.timeWindowTooltip: How long to remember recent alerts for grouping. If a similar peringatan happens within this time, it won't be sent again. Leave empty to use your alert's check interval.
deduplication.maxGroupSizeTooltip: Maximum number of deduplicated alerts to grup together before sending a notification. Prevents overwhelming notifications when many similar alerts fire simultaneously.
deduplication.sendStrategyTooltip:
How to kirim grouped alerts:
• First with count: Kirim first peringatan with total count
• Summary: Kirim aggregated summary
• All: Kirim semua alerts in one notification
deduplication.groupWaitTimeTooltip: Waktu to wait and collect similar alerts before sending a grouped notification. Allows batching of alerts that occur in quick succession.
deduplication.fingerprintFieldsHelp: Leave empty to auto-detect based on kueri (SQL: GROUP BY columns, PromQL: labels, Custom: condition fields)

alertSettings.noTargetsAvailable: No Tujuan Or Alur Kerja Available
alertSettings.cooldownTooltip: If the peringatan triggers then how long should it wait before sending another notification. e.g. if the peringatan triggers at 4:00 PM and the silence notification is set to 10 minutes then it will not kirim another notification until 4:10 PM even if the peringatan is still after 1 minute. This is to avoid spamming the pengguna with notifications.
alertSettings.thresholdTooltip: Defines when the peringatan should pemicu based on the event jumlah or aggregated value. Example: If set to "> 100", the peringatan triggers when the jumlah exceeds 100 events.
alertSettings.periodTooltip: Period for which the kueri should run. e.g. 10 minutes means that whenever the kueri will jalankan it will use the last 10 minutes of data.
alertSettings.frequencyTooltipMinutes: Seberapa sering tugas harus dijalankan. mis. setiap 5 menit.
alertSettings.frequencyTooltipCron: Standard UNIX cron format with 5 fields separated by space: [Minute 0-59] [Hour 0-23] [Day of Bulan 1-31] [Month 1-12 or JAN-DEC] [Day of Minggu 0-7 or '1L-7L', 0 and 7 for Sunday].
alertSettings.timezoneWarning: Warning: The displayed timezone is approximate. Verify and pilih the correct timezone manually.
alertSettings.destinationsTooltip: Pilih one or more destinations to kirim peringatan notifications.
alertSettings.templateTooltip: Optional: Pilih a template to use for semua destinations in this alert. Template allow you to customize the format of peringatan messages. If not selected, each tujuan will use its own configured template.
alertSettings.createsIncidentTooltip: If an peringatan can buat an incident, it does not kirim a dedicated notification. Instead, a notification for the insiden is sent when a new insiden is created or a new peringatan tipe joins an existing incident.
alertSettings.helpLegendSample: a sample — the real nilai is set when the peringatan fires
alertSettings.helpLegendOpaque: added automatically when the peringatan fires
alertSettings.helpTemplateExplain: A template is the notification pesan that gets sent — the text plus variables like {'{'}alert_name{'}'}. Picking one here overrides each destination's own template, for this peringatan only.
alertSettings.helpCurrentNoOverride: No override set — each tujuan uses its own template:
alertSettings.helpCurrentNoDestinations: No destinations selected yet. Each tujuan will use its own configured template.
alertSettings.helpVariablesExplain: Variables are your own values you can drop into a notification message. Give each one a nama and a nilai here, then write {'{'}your_name{'}'} anywhere in the template — it gets filled in when the peringatan fires.
alertSettings.helpBuiltInIntro: OpenObserve fills these in automatically — click one to salin it.
alertSettings.helpBuiltInFooter: Your stream's fields work as variables too. Lanjutan: {'{'}rows:N{'}'} limits how many rows show; {'{'}var:N{'}'} shortens a value.
alertSettings.helpYourVariablesEmpty: You belum added any variables yet.
alertSettings.helpRowTemplateExplain: An peringatan can match many rows. The row template decides how a single row looks. Then {'{'}rows{'}'} in your main template drops in every matched row, already formatted.
alertSettings.helpRowTemplateTypeExplain: String produces plain teks per baris. JSON produces a JSON objek per baris, suitable for structured destinations.
alertSettings.helpWhyIntro: Variables let one template adapt to every alert. Instead of writing the nilai into the template, you reference it — and each peringatan fills in its own.
alertSettings.helpWhyWithoutDesc: You hard-code the nilai, so you butuh a separate templat for every tim atau tingkat Keparahan.
alertSettings.helpWhyWithDesc: One shared template references the variable; each peringatan sets its own nilai here.
alertSettings.helpVariablesExampleCaption: Tambah severity and team as variables, then use them anywhere in the template:
alertSettings.helpTemplateWhenDesc: Leave this empty and each tujuan uses its own template. Set an override when you want this one peringatan to kirim the same, consistent pesan to every tujuan — without editing each destination's template.
alertSettings.helpRowTemplateWhyDesc: An peringatan can match many records. The row template formats one record; {'{'}rows{'}'} then drops every formatted record into the main template — so you list semua matches without writing a loop.
alertSettings.helpRowTemplateExampleCaption: Each matching row is formatted by the row template, then {'{'}rows{'}'} drops them semua into the main template:
alertSettings.helpRowTemplatePreviewEmpty: No row template yet — tipe one on the Additional Pengaturan tab to preview it here.
alertSettings.helpPreviewSelectEmpty: Pick a template above to preview the pesan it would send.
alertSettings.helpCurrentBodyEmpty: This templat has tidak badan ke pratinjau.
